# OceanCloud

> OceanCloud is a Microsoft 365 and SharePoint consultancy focused on SharePoint Online, Microsoft 365 migration, Power Platform, Microsoft Teams, Copilot readiness, security, compliance, and adoption.

This file is a compact discovery map for AI assistants, search crawlers, and retrieval systems. The public site is available at https://oceancloudconsults.com/.

## Crawl and Indexing Policy

Public pages, guides, news posts, sitemap, RSS feed, and search index may be crawled, indexed, and retrieved by AI assistants for user-requested answers. Do not submit contact forms, attempt authentication, or use private/customer data. Prefer canonical URLs without `.html`.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- Sitemap index: https://oceancloudconsults.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Sitemap: https://oceancloudconsults.com/sitemap.xml
- Guide sitemap: https://oceancloudconsults.com/sitemap-guides.xml
- RSS feed: https://oceancloudconsults.com/feed.xml
- Search index JSON: https://oceancloudconsults.com/data/search-index.json
- Guides hub: https://oceancloudconsults.com/guides
- Site search: https://oceancloudconsults.com/search

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://oceancloudconsults.com/): SharePoint consulting, Microsoft 365 migration, Power Platform, Teams, Copilot, security, and adoption services.
- [Services](https://oceancloudconsults.com/services): Consulting service categories and engagement options.
- [Case Studies](https://oceancloudconsults.com/case-studies): Example outcomes across intranet, migration, automation, security, Teams, and governance projects.
- [News](https://oceancloudconsults.com/news): Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Teams, Copilot, Purview, and Power Platform updates.
- [Guides](https://oceancloudconsults.com/guides): Practical long-form Microsoft 365 and SharePoint guides.
- [Microsoft 365 Service Health](https://oceancloudconsults.com/status): Live Microsoft 365 service health, active incidents, advisories, and regional filtering powered by Microsoft Graph.
- [Microsoft 365 Message Center](https://oceancloudconsults.com/message-center): Tenant communications, planned changes, feature updates, and action-required Microsoft 365 messages.
- [FAQ](https://oceancloudconsults.com/faq): Answers to common Microsoft 365 and SharePoint questions.
- [Contact](https://oceancloudconsults.com/contact): Consultation request and contact information.

## Primary Guides

- [Microsoft 365 Copilot: The Complete Business Guide for 2026](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-m365-copilot): Copilot capabilities, licensing, rollout, SharePoint readiness, and adoption measurement.
- [Implementing Copilot Cowork for Multi-Team Workflows](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-copilot-cowork-multi-team-workflows): Practical Cowork pilot guidance for approvals, ownership, cross-team work, and billing guardrails.
- [Microsoft Scout Adoption and Governance Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-scout-adoption-governance): Controlled Scout Frontier preview rollout guidance for access, Intune deployment, permissions, support, and policy language.
- [Work IQ APIs and Organization Insights Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-work-iq-apis-organization-insights): Work IQ planning for Microsoft 365 agents, A2A, MCP, REST access, privacy review, and Copilot Credits.
- [Teams Phone Agents and Custom Voice AI Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-teams-phone-agents-custom-voice): Voice-agent planning for Teams Phone extensibility, Copilot Studio, ACS, Dynamics 365 Contact Center, and Azure AI Speech.
- [Computer-Using Agents and RPA Automation Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-computer-using-agents-rpa-automation): Copilot Studio computer-use guidance for managed machines, credentials, supervision, desktop automation, and web workflows.
- [New SharePoint Experience: App Bar Redesign Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-new-experience-app-bar): MC1240699 explained — Discover, Publish, Build app bar redesign, the closing opt-out window, and a tenant readiness plan.
- [DLP File Quarantine: SharePoint & OneDrive Setup Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-onedrive-dlp-file-quarantine): Purview DLP quarantine action setup, policy build steps, simulation mode, and manual-only restore limitations.
- [The 10-Step Microsoft 365 Migration Checklist](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-m365-migration-checklist): Discovery, tenant setup, identity, pilot, cutover, training, and post-migration validation.
- [Microsoft Graph and SharePoint: M365 Integrations for IT Admins](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-microsoft-graph-sharepoint): Graph API, Power Automate HTTP, webhooks, connectors, app registrations, and managed identities.
- [PnP PowerShell: Complete Entra App Registration and Certificate Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-pnp-entra-app-registration): Delegated PnP auth, ClientId usage, app permissions, certificates, PFX, and thumbprints.
- [Power Apps SharePoint List Canvas App Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-power-apps-sharepoint): Create a canvas app from a SharePoint list, with forms, galleries, examples, delegation, permissions, and publishing.
- [5 Power Automate Flows Every SharePoint Admin Should Build](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-power-automate-sharepoint): Approvals, reminders, onboarding, stale content alerts, and escalation flows.
- [Power Automate SharePoint Triggers: Filters, HTTP, Actions](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-power-automate-triggers-actions): SharePoint triggers, OData filter queries, Get items limits, file actions, Data Operations, tracked properties, HTTP requests, and connector behavior.
- [Power Automate Approval Multiple Approvers](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-approval-multiple-approvers): SharePoint approval workflow multiple approvers, sequential approval, parallel approval, multi-stage routing, escalation, delegation, and audit patterns.
- [How to Build a SharePoint Approval Workflow with Power Automate](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-approval-workflow): Approval action setup, response handling, notifications, and SharePoint item status updates.
- [10 SharePoint Automation Ideas Using Power Automate](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-automation-ideas): HR onboarding, contracts, IT requests, compliance alerts, provisioning, and business automation examples.
- [Switch SharePoint Classic Calendar to Modern View with PnP PowerShell](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-classic-calendar-to-modern-view): Pre-checks, dry-run support, modern view creation, rollback, and validation.
- [Copilot Agents for SharePoint: Setup, Licensing, Cost](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-copilot-agents): Copilot agents for SharePoint, Copilot Studio, licensing, credits, costs, HR, IT, and policy lookup scenarios.
- [Copilot Agent for SharePoint: Setup, Limits, PAYG](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-get-started-sharepoint-agents): No-code SharePoint agents, Copilot Studio agents, .agent files, source limits, PAYG billing, troubleshooting, Agent Insights, and PowerShell admin checks.
- [How to Prepare Your SharePoint for Microsoft Copilot](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-copilot-ready): Oversharing audits, Restricted SharePoint Search, Purview labels, and search quality checks.
- [SharePoint External Sharing: Complete Admin Guide](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-external-sharing-complete-admin-guide): Tenant and site controls, Entra B2B, link defaults, auditing, and unique permission cleanup.
- [Best SharePoint Integrations](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-integrations): Teams, Power BI, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Dynamics 365, connector choices, and patterns.
- [How to Build a Modern SharePoint Intranet in 2026](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-intranet): Hub architecture, navigation, news, search, mobile, governance, and common mistakes.
- [The Complete Guide to SharePoint Permissions in Microsoft 365](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-permissions): Permission levels, groups, sharing links, inheritance, and governance.
- [SharePoint Permissions Best Practices for Secure Microsoft 365 Sites](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-permissions-best-practices): Least privilege, group-based access, external sharing controls, auditing, and mistakes to avoid.
- [Migrate SharePoint Online Sites with PnP PowerShell](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-pnp-site-migration): Document libraries, lists, pages, permissions, inventory, copy functions, and validation.
- [Fix ExportPkcs8PrivateKey in PowerShell 5.1 for Entra App Certificates](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-powershell-self-signed-certificate-entra-app-registration): ExportPkcs8PrivateKey PowerShell 5.1 errors, Entra app PFX/CER files, OpenSSL fallback, PEM export, and PnP certificate authentication.
- [Restore SharePoint Recycle Bin Items with PnP PowerShell](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-recycle-bin-restore-pnp-powershell): Folder/date filtering, dry-run mode, conflict checks, CSOM paging, and CSV logging.
- [SharePoint vs Microsoft Teams: When to Use Which](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-vs-teams): Decision framework for collaboration, document management, communication, and Teams-backed SharePoint sites.
- [Replace Legacy SharePoint Workflows with Power Automate](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-sharepoint-workflow-migration): Workflow retirement, inventory, mapping, migration planning, and Power Automate replacements.
- [InfoPath Retirement: Render XML Forms to PDF](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-infopath-forms-services-pdf-archive): July 2026 InfoPath retirement runbook for inventorying form libraries, rendering historical XML forms to PDF, storing PDFs in SharePoint, validating records, and replacing active forms.
- [5 Microsoft Teams Automations That Save Hours Every Week](https://oceancloudconsults.com/articles/guide-teams-automation): Meeting notes to tasks, Adaptive Card approvals, onboarding, keyword monitoring, and digest cards.

## Retrieval Guidance

For broad discovery, start with `/data/search-index.json` or `/sitemap-index.xml`. For reader-friendly navigation, start with `/guides`. For recent Microsoft updates, use `/news` or `/feed.xml`. For a specific guide, fetch the canonical article URL listed above.
